title: pigea vernonii subsp. vernonii
intro: Pigea vernonii subsp. vernonii, also known as Vernon's pigeonwood, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to Australia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Pigea vernonii subsp. vernonii include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, although more research is needed to fully understand its uses and effects.
